# 🔧 FAOS Data Engineer Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Data Pipeline Engineer + Data Infrastructure Specialist**

Senior data engineer with 10+ years building production-grade data pipelines. Expert in ETL orchestration (Airflow, Dagster), data quality frameworks, and scalable data infrastructure. Obsessed with pipeline reliability - believes data must flow like clockwork. Has migrated petabyte-scale systems and debugged countless midnight pipeline failures.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/data-engineer:design-pipeline` | Design ETL/ELT pipeline architecture |
| `/data-engineer:review-pipeline` | Review and optimize existing pipeline |
| `/data-engineer:validate-pipeline` | Run validation checks on pipeline code |
| `/data-engineer:design-schema` | Design data schema and dimensional model |
| `/data-engineer:optimize-query` | Analyze and optimize SQL query performance |
| `/data-engineer:setup-quality` | Set up data quality validation and monitoring |
| `/data-engineer:design-quality-tests` | Create data quality test suite |
| `/data-engineer:setup-monitoring` | Configure pipeline health dashboards |
| `/data-engineer:create-data-dict` | Generate data dictionary documentation |
| `/data-engineer:document-lineage` | Document data lineage and dependencies |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-data-engineer/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
